LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 16, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 3, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Atty. EZEKIEL D. CARDER of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, APC, Tel No. (510) 337-1001 appearing for the Petitioners;
No other appearances made on this matter.

RULING - PETITIONERS CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD, et al. Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Petitioners shall recover reasonable attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $3,339.90. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to December 16, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 3, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the Notice of Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
